case_title: IN RE: IN THE MATTER OF 150 POWELL STREET HOMEOWNERS

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITION FOR AMENDMENT TO DECLARATION OF COVENANTS, CONDITIONS AND RESTRICTIONS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: AMENDMENT NUMBER TWO (PETS) AND AMENDMENT NUMBER THREE (LEASING) ARE GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797
OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO APPROVE AMENDMENT TO DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT SMALL, KIMBALL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITION FOR AMENDMENT TO DECLARATION OF COVENANTS, CONDITIONS AND RESTRICTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: NUMBER ONE AMENDMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. AMENDMENT ONE IS NOT UNCONSTITUTIONAL OR DISCRIMINATORY, AND DOES NOT VIOLATE THE CIVIL RIGHTS ACT OR FAIR EMPLOYMENT ACT. PETITIONER WAS NOT A PARTY TO RESPONDENT'S PURCHASE AGREEMENT AND IS NOT BOUND BY ITS TERMS. RESPONDENT HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT THE AMENDMENT WOULD IMPAIR ANY SPECIAL RIGHTS, PREFERENCES, OR PRIVILEGES DESIGNATED IN THE DECLARATION AS BELONGING TO THE DECLARANT. HEARING ON PETITION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 18, 2010 FOR THE DECLARATION REGARDING AMENDMENTS #2 & #3. PETITIONER TO FILE FURTHER DECLARATION(S) REGARDING REASONABLENESS WITHIN SEVEN DAYS. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-08-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
